outputs.description: Case ID PhishlabsIOC.DRP.Title Case title

outputs.name: PhishlabsIOC.DRP.Resolution

outputs.name: PhishlabsIOC.DRP.CreatedBy.ID

outputs.name: PhishlabsIOC.DRP.CreatedBy.DisplayName

outputs.description: Email of case creator PhishlabsIOC.DRP.CaseType Type of the case
outputs.name: PhishlabsIOC.DRP.Email

outputs.description: Status of the case PhishlabsIOC.DRP.DateCreated Case creation date
outputs.name: PhishlabsIOC.DRP.CaseStatus

outputs.description: Case closing date PhishlabsIOC.DRP.DateModified Case modification date
outputs.name: PhishlabsIOC.DRP.DateClosed

outputs.description: URL of the registrant PhishlabsIOC.DRP.AttackSources.WhoIs.Registration.Created Creation date of the registration
